code: import React from'react';import{Card}from'antd';import{t}from'i18next';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BoardCard=_ref=>{let{boardtitle,boardUrl}=_ref;let imageUrl="".concat(process.env.PUBLIC_URL,"/pics/Dashboard_pics/").concat(boardtitle,".png");return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Card,{className:"board-card",bordered:true,style:{width:820,height:680},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{alt:"example",src:imageUrl,style:{maxWidth:'100%',maxHeight:'100%'}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{flex:'1 1 auto',marginRight:'10px'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:t("boardtitle.".concat(boardtitle))})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{flex:'0 0 auto'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:boardUrl,target:"_blank",style:{fontSize:'16px'},rel:"noreferrer",children:t('ViewDetails')})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:t("boardcontent.".concat(boardtitle))})]});};export default BoardCard;
